title: Cannot copy to docker-archive
body:
I have followed [copy instructions](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/main/docs/skopeo-copy.1.md#examples) with `skopeoo` `1.15.0`/`1.1`:

```
skopeo copy  --insecure-policy copy docker://busybox:latest docker-archive:archive-file.tar:busybox:latest
```

But it fails:

```
Container "IMAGE-NAME" uses a "transport":"details" format.

Supported transports:
containers-storage, dir, docker, docker-archive, docker-daemon, oci, oci-archive, ostree, sif, tarball

See skopeo(1) section "IMAGE NAMES" for the expected format

Usage:
skopeo copy [command options] SOURCE-IMAGE DESTINATION-IMAGE

Examples:
skopeo copy docker://quay.io/skopeo/stable:latest docker://registry.example.com/skopeo:latest
```

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

That command has `copy` twice.
